understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating a grid, taking falling routes created by horizontal moves and gravity, and using clicks to clear breakable blocks that block paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal moves (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) cause the player to fall in the current gravity direction until landing safely or hitting a hazard. CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles to open fall paths. Landing on spikes 'u'/'v' loses immediately. Gravity reverses or shifts paths in some areas. UNDO can revert mistakes. The previewed landing positions and corridor scan indicate where each move will drop you, helping choose passage columns to reach new y-levels.
